Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 
53 
CLM_SUBSCR_ADR_ZIP_CD 
LABEL: 
Medicare Subscriber Address – ZIP Code 
DESCRIPTION: This field represents the subscriber's mailing ZIP code. It is the zip 5 and 4-digit extension as submitted 
on the encounter record. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_SUBSCR_ADR_ZIP_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_SUBSCR_ADR_ZIP_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
9 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S): 
IP base
